name: study-slots
description: A pixel-art casino that decides how long you study today 🎰

scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && wait-on http://localhost:5173 && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && vite build
